title: Lofi-Fruits Disks
description: Simple mod adding custom music discs. A collection of my favorites by Lofi-Fruits. Remastered as musik disks for playing on a jukebox.
body:
A small mod adding music disks.

A collection of my favorites by Lofi-Fruits.

Remastered by yours truly and included as musik disks to be played on a jukebox.

UPDATED 1.3+ Creepers can drop all disks, modded and vanilla.

**Lofi-Fruits covers:**
-----------------------------------------
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
*All We Do

*Breakeven  
*Deathbed  
*I See Fire  
*Industry Baby  
*Jar Of Hearts  
*Jocelyn Flores  
*L's Theme  
*Lucid Dreams  
*Say My Name  
*Stan  
*Still D.R.E  
*Suga Suga  
*Sweater Weather  
*Wonderwall  
</details>
-----------------------------------------

Credit where its due.
Check out and support!
[https://www.youtube.com/@LofiFruits]

-----------------------------------------
Feel free to modify this or use in any mod pack.  

Hope you enjoy my selections! :D   
  
  
If you like it, check out my other mods.  
  
  
## **Questions** or you found a **bug**?  
Please, let me know on **Discord**. I **WILL respond** to an issue!  
Create a private support ticket/conversation with this channel:  
([https://discord.gg/VNAWJnyr7f])  
or feel free to dm me a comment! <3
